
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Tiger|kanji=甲寅|romaji=kinoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=jiǎyín|w=chia-yin|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ȵin²¹|y=gaap6 jan4|j=gaap6 jan4|ci=kaːp̚ jɐn|mc=kæp ŋin|oc-bs=kaːp ŋin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Tiger also known as  Kinoe-tora''' (甲寅, also known as  '''Kōboku-no-Tora''' or '''Kōin''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 51st combination of the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoto-ushi|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto-ushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Kinoe-usagi|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe-usagi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} '''Kinoe''' (甲) represents Yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} '''Tora''' (寅) also represents Yang Wood, forming a {{ill|Harmonious Combination|ja|五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harmonious Combination|13=User:Immanuelle/比和|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Tiger (甲寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gapin (갑인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Dần

==Years of Yang Wood Tiger==
After the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 54.

Before the Common Era, a year is a Kinoe-tora year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 7.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Kinoe-tora Years'''
|-
![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]]
|-
|
*[[:en:967 BC|967 BC]]
*[[:en:907 BC|907 BC]]
*[[:en:847 BC|847 BC]]
*{{ill|787 BC|en|787 BC|qid=Q1086583|lt=787 BC|1=787 BC}}
*{{ill|727 BC|en|727 BC|qid=Q1086577|lt=727 BC|1=727 BC}}
*{{ill|667 BC|en|667 BC|qid=Q255157|lt=667 BC|1=667 BC}}
*{{ill|607 BC|en|607 BC|qid=Q247615|lt=607 BC|1=607 BC}}
*{{ill|547 BC|en|547 BC|qid=Q243539|lt=547 BC|1=547 BC}}
*{{ill|487 BC|en|487 BC|qid=Q237230|lt=487 BC|1=487 BC}}
*{{ill|427 BC|en|427 BC|qid=Q79761|lt=427 BC|1=427 BC}}
*{{ill|367 BC|en|367 BC|qid=Q83263|lt=367 BC|1=367 BC}}
*{{ill|307 BC|en|307 BC|qid=Q80846|lt=307 BC|1=307 BC}}
*{{ill|247 BC|en|247 BC|qid=Q35767|lt=247 BC|1=247 BC}}
*{{ill|187 BC|en|187 BC|qid=Q46279|lt=187 BC|1=187 BC}}
*{{ill|127 BC|en|127 BC|qid=Q47445|lt=127 BC|1=127 BC}}
*{{ill|67 BC|en|67 BC|qid=Q41334|lt=67 BC|1=67 BC}}
*{{ill|7 BC|en|7 BC|qid=Q40915|lt=7 BC|1=7 BC}}
|
*[[:en:54 AD|54 AD]]
*[[:en:114 AD|114 AD]]
*[[:en:174 AD|174 AD]]
*[[:en:234 AD|234 AD]]
*[[:en:294 AD|294 AD]]
*[[:en:354 AD|354 AD]]
*[[:en:414 AD|414 AD]]
*[[:en:474 AD|474 AD]]
*[[:en:534 AD|534 AD]]
*[[:en:594 AD|594 AD]]
*[[:en:654 AD|654 AD]]
*[[:en:714 AD|714 AD]]
*[[:en:774 AD|774 AD]]
*[[:en:834 AD|834 AD]]
*[[:en:894 AD|894 AD]]
*[[:en:954 AD|954 AD]]
|
*[[:en:1014 AD|1014 AD]]
*[[:en:1074 AD|1074 AD]]
*[[:en:1134 AD|1134 AD]]
*[[:en:1194 AD|1194 AD]]
*[[:en:1254 AD|1254 AD]]
*[[:en:1314 AD|1314 AD]]
*[[:en:1374 AD|1374 AD]]
*[[:en:1434 AD|1434 AD]]
*[[:en:1494 AD|1494 AD]]
*[[:en:1554 AD|1554 AD]]
*[[:en:1614 AD|1614 AD]]
*[[:en:1674 AD|1674 AD]]
*[[:en:1734 AD|1734 AD]]
*[[:en:1794 AD|1794 AD]]
*[[:en:1854 AD|1854 AD]]
*[[:en:1914 AD|1914 AD]]
*{{ill|1974 AD|en|1974 AD|qid=Q4575973|lt=1974 AD|1=1974 AD}}
|
*[[:en:2034 AD|2034 AD]]
*[[2094 AD]]
*[[2154 AD]]
*[[2214 AD]]
*[[2274 AD]]
*[[2334 AD]]
*[[2394 AD]]
*[[2454 AD]]
*[[2514 AD]]
*[[2574 AD]]
*[[2634 AD]]
*[[2694 AD]]
*[[2754 AD]]
*[[2814 AD]]
*[[2874 AD]]
*[[2934 AD]]
*[[2994 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7 / {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (1854) - {{ill|Tora no Taihen|ja|寅の大変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tora no Taihen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|1854 Tōkai earthquake|en|1854 Tōkai earthquake|qid=Q3742363|lt=Ansei Tōkai earthquake|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, {{ill|1854 Nankai earthquake|en|1854 Nankai earthquake|qid=Q4554893|lt=Ansei Nankai earthquake|1=1854 Nankai earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 Tsuchi Yasunobu, CiNii] Tsuchi Yasunobu (ed.): "Historical Records of Earthquakes and Tsunamis in Kōchi Prefecture," Disaster Science and Technology Research Materials 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience.</ref>

==Months of Yang Wood Tiger==
In years where the last digit of the Western calendar is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} of Mizunoto (癸) or Tsuchinoe (戊)), the first month of the year is a Kinoe-tora month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|qid=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).

==Days of Yang Wood Tiger==
=== Selected Days ===
Kinoe-tora days are the second day of {{ill|Hassō|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassō|1=Hassen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390771}} (excluding intercalary days).
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}
* {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

== References ==
{{Reflist|2|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Tiger|qq=ja|甲寅|version=102294365|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904409|af|Houttier (astrologie)|cdo|Gák-ìng|de|Holz-Tiger|hak|Kap-yìm|ja|甲寅|ko|갑인|vi|Giáp Dần|za|Gyapyinz|zh-min-nan|Kap-în|zh-yue|甲寅|zh|甲寅|zh-min-nan|Bó͘-chîn|zh-yue|戊午|cdo|Tsuch-cṳ̄de|nds|Wasser-Pferdevi|de|Yang Wood Tiger|fr|Tigre de bois|af|Waterperd (astrologie)|de|Wasser-Pferdeen|en|Water Horse|fr|Cheval de eauboishak|it|Tsu-chṳ́id|ko|무오|vi|Mậu Ngọ|za|Mouzceij|zh|戊午|ar|Yang Wood Tiger}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
